title: Basic Interactions (click, type, etc.)
description: Learn how to perform common user interactions like clicking, typing, hovering, and form manipulation.
objectives: Handle checkboxes, radio buttons, and dropdowns
Work with file uploads and downloads

sections.title: Click Operations
Text Input Operations
Checkboxes and Radio Buttons
Dropdown and Select
Hover and Focus
Keyboard Interactions
Mouse Operations
File Upload and Download

keyTakeaways: fill() is the fastest way to input text, type() simulates realistic typing
check() and uncheck() handle checkboxes and radio buttons
selectOption() works with standard dropdowns, custom dropdowns need click actions
hover() reveals hidden elements and menus
Keyboard shortcuts use press() with modifier keys like 'Control+A'
dragTo() simplifies drag and drop operations
All interactions auto-wait for elements to be actionable
